if.test: dateStart != null and dateStart != '' and dateEnd != null and dateEnd != ''

where.if: AND w.reg_date >= #{dateStart}::DATE AND w.reg_date < (#{dateEnd}::DATE + INTERVAL '1 day')

mapper.select: SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpWidget :: selectById */ w.* , lib.widget_nm AS widget_lib_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_widget w LEFT JOIN dp_widget_lib lib ON lib.widget_lib_id = w.widget_lib_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = w.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = w.widget_type_cd WHERE w.widget_id = #{id}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpWidget :: selectList */ w.* , lib.widget_nm AS widget_lib_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_widget w LEFT JOIN dp_widget_lib lib ON lib.widget_lib_id = w.widget_lib_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = w.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = w.widget_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT /* base.ec.dp :: DpWidget :: selectPageList */ w.* , lib.widget_nm AS widget_lib_nm , ste.site_nm AS site_nm , cd_wt.code_label AS widget_type_cd_nm FROM dp_widget w LEFT JOIN dp_widget_lib lib ON lib.widget_lib_id = w.widget_lib_id LEFT JOIN sy_site ste ON ste.site_id = w.site_id LEFT JOIN sy_code cd_wt ON cd_wt.code_grp = 'WIDGET_TYPE' AND cd_wt.code_value = w.widget_type_cd
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(w.*) /* base.ec.dp :: DpWidget :: selectPageCount */ FROM dp_widget w
